item.title: The anniversary of me losing 80 lbs and keeping it gone!
item.description: 28 and 240lbs now 34 and 160! I'm really proud of it. I know selfies aren't allowed. I'm sorry ?

item.dc:creator: UnknownOrca

item.title: Yor Forger - SpyxFamily Cosplay
item.description:
I cosplayed as Yor to go to the new "SpyxFamily - Code: White" movie :D It was adorable and I felt adorable in this while watching it. Been utterly obsessed with this anime lately and especially her character, she's so fun.
The movie cup will hold my keys from now on :D It was also fun to find a theatre that played it in Japanese with English subtitles.
Reference image/gif of Yor's outfit for reference
And this gif from the show... because this show is spectacular and everyone should see it :P
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Gonna have to physically move me into the office
item.description: Corporations can get fucked. I think they underestimate how much I hate corporations and don’t give a fuck what one guy wants all remote workers to do. They’ll have to fire me then I can at least get u employment until my next job. I’m a data analyst so it won’t be that hard.
